display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
公理 2.1 Capability Atomicity
业务能力边界由价值创造定义

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
公理 2.2 Value Stream Conservation
价值流价值总量守恒

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
定理 2.3 Business-Application Bridging
业务服务是业务-应用桥接点

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
M.2 Variability Axiom
共性/变性分离

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
M.3 Hierarchy Non-Reduction
层次不可约

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P1
业务能力是可复用的最小业务语义单元

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 价值创造边界稳定，可跨组织/技术实现复用

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P2
价值流复用 = 能力有序组合 + 阶段间契约

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 缺少接口契约的组合退化为堆砌

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P3
业务服务契约稳定性决定业务-应用解耦度

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 契约稳定则两层线性依赖；契约频繁变更则耦合指数上升

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P4
变性管理是业务复用工程化的核心

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 没有变性点的复用是克隆，不是工程复用

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P5
业务层复用失败不能由应用/组件层优化完全弥补

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 价值定义错误时，技术优化无法补偿

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
结论 P6
BPMN/DMN 分离使流程结构稳定、规则灵活

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: DMN 外部化规则，BPMN 网关仅调用决策结果
